title: eupatorium elatum
intro: Eupatorium elatum, also known as the tall boneset, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the Eupatorium genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Eupatorium elatum include relief from fever, colds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and allergies.
